auth.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email to continue. Check your inbox for the link.
auth.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This email is already in use.
auth.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED_signup: If this email isn't already taken, we'll send you a verification link.
auth.EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.TOKEN_INVALID: This link is invalid. Please request a new one.
auth.TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts — please wait a moment and try again.
auth.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and retry.
auth.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
